title: On nilpotent - invariant modules
authors: Dept. of Research and International Affairs, Vinh University
author_string: Dept. of Research and International Affairs, Vinh University, Duc Tai, DINH
abstract: A module is called  nilpotent-invariant if it is invariant under any nilpotent endomorphism  of its injective envelope. The class of   these modules is  studied, and some of their properties are developed. In this paper, we continue to study nilpotent-invariant modules over general envelopes.
